irtsim 0.1.2.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
    • Get Started
    • Choosing Item Parameters for Sample-Size Planning

Package index

Core Pipeline

The three-step workflow: specify a design, add study conditions, and run the simulation.

irt_design()
Create an IRT Design Specification
irt_study()
Define Study Conditions for an IRT Simulation
irt_simulate()
Run an IRT Monte Carlo Simulation

Results Analysis

Summarize, visualize, and extract recommendations from simulation results.

summary(<irt_results>)
Summarize IRT Simulation Results
plot(<irt_results>)
Plot IRT Simulation Results
plot(<summary_irt_results>)
Plot Summary of IRT Simulation Results
recommended_n()
Find the Minimum Sample Size Meeting a Criterion Threshold

Utilities

Helper functions for parameter generation and planning.

irt_params_2pl()
Generate 2PL Item Parameters
irt_params_grm()
Generate GRM Item Parameters
irt_iterations()
Compute Required Monte Carlo Replications

Print Methods

print(<irt_design>)
Print an IRT Design
print(<irt_study>)
Print an IRT Study
print(<irt_results>)
Print an IRT Simulation Result
print(<summary_irt_results>)
Print Summary of IRT Simulation Results

On this page
